{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322195711F69E1F97BB59D2C3F006"}"},"total":568},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608676987435565849","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"绝对好小说，看了太多柯南同人，基本都会参加破案，但是都知道答案了反而没意思，这小说主要是感情方面，细腻的不要不要的，所以我会经常看好几遍。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771542959,"group_id":"7603736560684518462","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4gFgcR2NUu1KTEHiZpqFc3mQyqwASMxB9F4+w/2SsZP","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/22b0961d8108441cb88464b7df0e3026~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703909&x-signature=BmGbsYPH6XBYAQSfug1N0FeJwQw%3D","user_id":"1394658095401652","user_name":"华琳吖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1394658095401652","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7603736560684518462","book_info":{"abstract":"（新书  评分刚开   后面评分会涨的）
【多女主】➕【情感向】➕【日常】
一个从小是孤儿的退休青年杀手，在米花镇开了一家料理店后，会发生什么事呢，他又会邂逅那些人呢？
本作相对于柯南同人文更偏情感文，算是用柯南世界写的一个情感故事，不走原作探案路子，节奏偏快，拆cp


希望各位读者耐心看完前50章再做评论，应该是不会让大家失望的（既然是情感文，所以不是无脑收女，希望给这本书一点耐心，第二卷开始发力）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/def92becdedd07d28446a25ebd03f153","author":"活心真如","author_id":"","book_id":"7603736560684518462","book_name":"柯学：离开后，怎么她们都黏着我","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d8c0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7603736603588035134","read_count":"84418","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"330671"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"138","tags":"动漫衍生,二次元,多女主,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3b5731131c83b7648d2265a23e10a24c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779364631&x-signature=9IYAl2R5sDjZQqW0xe0x7CpNRD8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1382534358502250","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"76"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322195711F69E1F97BB59D2C3F006"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9726,"reply_count":0,"show
